vignette: I’m seeing a 500 error on the “Sales by Region” dashboard whenever I filter for Q1 data. It was working fine just a week ago and now it just fails silently. Can you check if there’s a regression in the latest release?

I just received invoice #12345 for $10,000, but last month’s invoice was $8,000 and we didn’t request any upgrades. Could you help me understand the discrepancy before I approve payment? Thanks.

We’d like to upgrade from the Standard plan to Enterprise so we can get 24/7 support and custom branding. What’s the process, and will we be charged pro-rata for the remainder of the month? We have a major demo next week.
We were charged twice for our subscription this month—invoice 98765 shows two identical charges. Can you please refund the duplicate amount before our board meeting on Thursday?

It would be really helpful if you added SSO support via Okta (SAML/OAuth) for our analysts. Our security team is pushing for stricter access control, and we need a timeline or roadmap for that feature.

We’re onboarding and stuck at the on-prem data warehouse connector step: the guide mentions schema mapping but doesn’t show how to map nested fields. Could someone walk us through the recommended setup? We need to load six months of historical data by Friday.
All of our dashboards are now returning “No Data” after yesterday’s failover. This is affecting the European sales team and delaying decision-making. Please escalate—what’s the ETA on a fix?

We just discovered that the user_engagement table is missing all of last night’s rows in our production account. Our SLA guarantees data integrity, so this feels like a partial data loss incident. Can you help us recover the missing entries immediately?
I opened a ticket about API latency yesterday but haven’t heard back. Our SLA requires p95 under 200ms; right now p95 is at 2 seconds, which is breaking our service contract. Please respond ASAP.
Could you point me to the documentation for setting up email alerts when a metric exceeds a threshold? I saw an overview in docs but nothing about combining multiple conditions or custom templates.
The docs mention exporting dashboards to CSV, but in my account the “Export” button is greyed out. Is this a permission issue or a limitation on my plan? Any workaround would be appreciated.
Our integration calls to GET /v1/reports intermittently return malformed JSON (missing commas between objects). It’s causing our ETL pipeline to crash—can you reproduce this and provide a patch?
Why is the billing portal so confusing? I can’t find our subscription details or usage breakdown anywhere, and there’s no chat support link on the page. This is really frustrating.

The CFO needs an ROI report template by tomorrow morning, but I can’t locate one in the library. If there isn’t a prebuilt template, could your team quickly develop one for enterprise use? We’re under serious time pressure.
Our dashboard is showing a blank page when I try to apply the date filter on our main sales report. It worked fine yesterday but now I just get a spinner that never stops. Can you please investigate?

I keep getting HTTP 500 errors when hitting the /v1/metrics API endpoint. This started after the last deploy and none of our automated tests caught it. We need a fix ASAP.
The monthly active user count is fluctuating wildly and doesn’t line up with our internal logs. We suspect a bug in your aggregation logic on the dashboard widgets. Can you clarify?

After updating our schema, the data explorer UI crashes as soon as I select any custom field. It was working perfectly a week ago and now even the basic queries fail. This is blocking our QA sign off.

We’d like to upgrade from Pro to Enterprise mid-cycle to get additional seats and SSO support. How will the proration work and when will the new features be available in our account? Let me know what steps we need to follow.

Can you refund the overage fees applied on our December invoice? We were never notified that we’d exceeded our API call limits, and this came as a surprise. We’d like to avoid this in future billing periods.
Our last invoice shows a plan change fee that we didn’t request and I can’t find any support ticket about it. It feels like a bug in the billing portal. Please clarify why we’re being charged extra.

We need the ability to restrict access at the department level and integrate with our Okta groups for SSO. Is there a roadmap or ETA for hierarchical role-based access controls? This feature is critical for our security compliance.

Is it possible to add a waterfall chart as a native visualization option? Right now we’re exporting to Excel just to get the breaks between contributions. It would save us a lot of time if you could include it in the product.

We’re setting up our new enterprise account and would appreciate guidance on enforcing row-level security across multiple data sources. Can someone onboard us or provide best practices? Our data governance team is waiting.

I see an extra seat charge for last month, but we only have 10 active users in the team admin panel. Could this be a billing mistake? If so, please correct the invoice.

Is there a way to embed live dashboards into our Salesforce Lightning pages using iframe or a plugin? I saw a reference to a code snippet in the community forum but not in the official docs. Appreciate any guidance.
All our key dashboards show “No data available” except for ones we manually refresh. This started just after a deploy. Our clients are panicking—do we have an outage? Please investigate ASAP.

Our webhook subscriptions randomly time out: some requests succeed, others fail with a 504 Gateway Timeout. We haven’t changed our endpoint or network configs. Any insight into what could be happening?

We’re seeing random 500 errors on our main dashboard since this morning, and widgets are failing to load critical charts. The issue started right after your last patch, and refreshing doesn’t help. Can you investigate? Thanks.

Our nightly data sync from S3 isn’t picking up new files—last update was 48 hours ago. No changes on our side, but the ingestion logs show “timeout” repeatedly. Any suggestions for a quick workaround?

The API endpoint for pulling user sessions returns a malformed JSON payload intermittently. Some objects are missing fields while others contain unexpected nulls. Please advise on a fix or rollback plan.
Our last invoice is $1,500 higher than usual, but we haven’t increased usage or added seats. Could someone clarify which line items changed? The billing portal isn’t showing details.
I tried upgrading from the Basic to the Pro plan yesterday—my card was charged twice but I’m still on Basic. Could you confirm the status of the upgrade and refund the duplicate charge if possible?
We need a refund for the extra storage we accidentally purchased last week. The license key hasn’t been activated, so it’s unused. Please process ASAP.

We’d love the ability to assign custom roles with granular permissions to each dashboard. Our compliance team requires view-only and edit-only distinctions at the project level. Any chance this can be prioritized?
During onboarding we hit a snag with SAML SSO—users get a 403 after login. We followed the guide but roles aren’t mapping correctly. Can someone walk us through the setup?
Production is down—nobody can access the analytics portal for the past 20 minutes and our customers are screaming. Please escalate immediately and restore service under our SLA.
We appear to have lost yesterday’s transaction data across multiple tables. Backup restore also isn’t pulling those records. This is critical for our end-of-day reporting—need urgent assistance.
I noticed our uptime SLA credit hasn’t been applied after last week’s 45-minute outage. Could you check our account and issue the appropriate credit?
How do I schedule a daily PDF report to be emailed at 6am UTC? I skimmed the docs but didn’t find an example for timezone settings. Any pointers would be great.
Is there a way to export all user activity logs for the past quarter into CSV via the UI? I see a download button but it only exports the last 7 days.
We’re missing data points on our revenue breakdown widget, but the raw SQL query returns the right numbers. Not sure if this is a display bug or a filter issue. Can someone clarify?
We’re exploring the Enterprise plan and need pricing for 5000 users plus dedicated support. Also curious if usage-based billing applies to API calls. Please send details and next steps.
The mobile view shows inconsistent chart scaling compared to desktop, and labels overlap. It feels like a styling bug since the data is correct on web. Any ETA on a fix?
We’d love built-in machine learning predictions for churn risk based on our historic data. Right now we have to export and run models externally. Could you consider adding this feature roadmap item?
As a large enterprise customer, what are the best practices for onboarding 20TB of historical data into your platform? We need to avoid hitting throughput limits or throttling.
Query response times have jumped from sub-second to 15–20 seconds over the past day, and our dashboard refresh is crawling. This is impacting our real-time monitoring. Please help us troubleshoot.
Our alert notifications aren’t firing for threshold breaches, though the conditions are met and logs show the trigger executed. Not sure if this is a bug or config issue—can you confirm?

Hello Support, when I apply the date range filter on our main sales dashboard I get a 500 internal server error and all charts disappear, even though the data still exists in the raw table. I’ve tried clearing my browser cache and testing in incognito mode but the issue persists. Could you please investigate?

Hi team, our latest invoice shows a $3,200 overage fee that doesn’t match any usage spikes we see in the dashboard—our plan should cover up to 10 million events. We need either an explanation or a refund for that overcharge, and we’re considering upgrading next week so please advise on the best way to adjust our billing moving forward.

We’re a new enterprise customer onboarding with 150+ users, and we’d like to request support for custom SAML attributes during single sign-on setup. Additionally, it would be great if you could add the ability to trigger Slack alerts when a metric crosses a threshold; this would be essential for our ops team. Can someone guide us through the SSO configuration steps and let us know if the Slack integration feature is on your roadmap?

URGENT: All our production ETL pipelines have stopped syncing since 3 AM UTC and we’ve already missed two SLA windows—customer dashboards are showing zero revenue for the day. We can’t afford more downtime, please escalate immediately and restore service or provide a rollback plan. This is impacting live orders and we need confirmation within the next 30 minutes.

Hey there, I’m trying to configure incremental data syncs via the REST API and can’t figure out what parameters I need to pass for the ‘lastUpdated’ filter. The docs mention a cursor but don’t show an example payload—do you have a sample request or best practices for setting up scheduled incremental jobs? Thanks!
